# LLMs.txt for pothole.openindia.org

## Website Overview
OpenPothole is a community-driven civic engagement platform that enables citizens to report potholes and verify repairs in Bangalore, India. Built on Open311 API standards for transparent and accessible civic engagement.

## Site Structure
- Home Page (`/`): Main landing page with project overview and statistics
- Map Page (`/map`): Interactive map showing reported potholes and their status
- Report Page (`/report`): Form for citizens to submit new pothole reports
- Potholes Page (`/potholes`): Individual pothole detail pages

## Key Features
- Anonymous pothole reporting with geotagged photos
- Real-time tracking of report status
- Community verification of repairs
- Open311 API integration for government transparency
- No login required for citizen participation
- Interactive map visualization
- Real-time statistics dashboard

## Contact Information
- GitHub: https://github.com/areebahmeddd/OpenPothole
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nPmozZFyn9Q
- Organization: Open India Initiative
